methodology.test: Mann-Whitney U (two-sided, tie-corrected, normal approximation with continuity correction)
methodology.rationale: Impression counts are heavily right-skewed; rank-based tests are robust to that shape. Cliff's delta floor of 0.20 excludes tiny-but-significant differences that aren't practically actionable.

top.text:
Matthew Boyd starts tonight — first appearance since May 3.

He needed minor knee surgery after a freak injury playing with his kids. Seven weeks later, he's back.

Counsell called it "a big deal." With five starters shelved, he's not wrong

Pete Crow-Armstrong. 10th inning. RBI double. Cubs 4, Mets 3.

Four-game sweep at Citi. 7-0 vs. New York in 2026, outscoring them 51-24. Boyd gave 4 2/3 scoreless innings in his return from the IL. Broken rotation, intact offense.

#Cubs #G

20 days to August 3.

Milner's appendectomy made the bullpen as urgent as the rotation. Joe Ryan's less available now that the Twins are in the Wild Card race. Finnegan and Fairbanks are on the board.

Jed Hoyer needs to move fast.

#Cubs #

The Cubs' rotation runs on duct tape — and somehow it keeps working.

David Peterson: 5.2 IP, 2 ER in his debut Saturday. Jaxon Wiggins: 2⅔ rehab innings at High-A on Sunday, expected back at Iowa soon.

35 days until Jed Hoyer's deadline.

Series W at American Family Field.

Cubs 4, Brewers 3 in 10 — Suzuki singled home two runs in the 10th, Wicks got the final out on a bases-loaded double play. Cubs take 2-of-3 in Milwaukee.

Cubs are 46-38. Padres in town tonight.

#Cubs #G

Brewers 6, Cubs 2. Jacob Misiorowski was absolutely dominant.

6 innings. 1 run. 8 strikeouts. Seiya Suzuki homered — Chicago's one real punch all night. Cubs fall to 44-38 and need Imanaga to answer tonight.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

21 days until August 3. The Cubs still need a starter — and the Joe Ryan trade just got complicated.

Minnesota is in the Wild Card hunt. The Twins aren't selling. Jed Hoyer needs a Plan B, and he needs it fast.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB

Jaxon Wiggins — elbow inflammation after just 2 Iowa starts.

The Cubs' top pitching prospect was supposed to add rotation depth down the line. Five starters already on the IL. This depth chart is getting thinner by the week.

#Cubs #MLB #C

Pete Crow-Armstrong in June: 10 HRs. .867 slugging. 20 games.

He's not on a hot streak. He's in the middle of one of the best offensive months in Cubs history. The 24-year-old center fielder is CARRYING this team right now.

#Cubs #GoCubs

Pete Crow-Armstrong in June: 10 home runs. .867 slugging.

Season line: .287/.367/.521, 17 HR, 18 SB. The 24-year-old is CARRYING this offense — and doing it while five rotation spots sit empty on the IL.

All-Star caliber season. Not a deb

SUZUKI AGAIN.

Ninth inning, bases loaded. Seiya Suzuki lines a walk-off single off Mason Miller — Cubs win 3-2.

MLB-leading 10th walk-off of the 2026 season. No team in baseball wins like Chicago.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

bottom_performers.text:
Jameson Taillon made his first rehab start Sunday at High-A South Bend — 3.1 IP, 1 ER, 45 pitches.

If all goes to plan, he's back in the Cubs rotation before the All-Star break.

The cavalry is almost here.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

Wild card check-in, July 7:

Cubs 50-40, tied for No. 2 NL wild card
Cardinals 47-40 — 1.5 games back in the race

One hot week in Baltimore turns a tight race into breathing room.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

Baltimore has lost 8 of their last 10 games. The Orioles are in freefall.

The Cubs arrive at Camden Yards rolling — 7-3 over their last 10, 50-40, No. 2 NL wild card.

Timing. Is. Everything.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

Cubs arrive in Baltimore for a 3-game set at Camden Yards — first pitch 5:35 PM CT tonight.

Matthew Boyd vs. Shane Baz. Cubs (50-40), No. 2 NL wild card. Orioles (42-49), losers of 8 of their last 10.

The second half starts here.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

Pete Crow-Armstrong is one of the best players in baseball right now.

In June: No. 1 in hits (29), No. 1 in BA (.433), No. 1 in OPS (1.383). Season WAR of 4.6 leads all NL position players.

He's ranked 14th in All-Star fan voting. Fourteenth.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs
